revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
/* Tracking category */ [[User:Zackmann08]] please also update doc when you change it
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
